title: L&T Infotech International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: L&T Infotech International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
L&T Infotech International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Howrah office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About L&T Infotech International Enterprises:
L&T Infotech International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Infotech International Enterprises!
